## Hook Safety

- [ ] No proxy, UUPS, initializer, diamond, or delegatecall pattern.
- [ ] No deploy script, payment action, merge automation, or governance change.
- [ ] Any fee, limit, or config parameter has an explicit numeric cap.
- [ ] Parameter work includes bound-focused tests or reviewer evidence.
- [ ] REP, TDH, and holder thresholds are not treated as live authority.
